title: SaaS tenant owner is super admin
description:
The purchasing email for each SaaS workspace is now elevated to super admin inside their own tenant (PipeShare + PipeSync), instead of showing as CLIENT.

Who is affected: pipeshare.net SaaS customers who bought a subscription. Existing owners are upgraded on next login or via elevate-saas-tenant-owners.cjs.
changeLog: Tenant purchaser gets employee/superadmin account type in Postgres and capabilities.
deriveAccountModel no longer forces self-signup SaaS owners to CLIENT.
Provisioning and signup apply full admin role bundle for workspace owners.
Tenant auth snapshot in Wasabi stores owner as superadmin.
